description: Sample output generated from SUST_Preli_Sample_Cases.json Case SAMPLE-01

input.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. The number was supposed to be 01712345678 but I think I typed it wrong. The person isn't responding to my call. Please help me get my money back.

output.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT via TXN-9101 to +8801719876543, which they believe was the wrong recipient. The intended number was 01712345678. Recipient is unresponsive.
output.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-9101 details with the customer and initiate the wrong-transfer dispute workflow per policy.
output.customer_reply: We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-9101. Our dispute team will review the case and contact you through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.
